summary: Detailed Part 3 plan for full end-to-end system testing covering: WhatsApp chatbot flow testing (all 5 languages, all 3 scenarios, CV upload at any state), recruitment system UI and CRUD testing (all 16 pages), integration/sync testing (chatbot-to-backend pipeline, mismatch data flow, job cache refresh), performance and load testing, and a pre-flight checklist. Organized as a structured test plan with pass/fail criteria.
